title: Green Hairstreak Butterfly Corridor - San Francisco - LocalWiki
content: The Green Hairstreak Butterfly Corridor is an area of land, starting in the mid-Sunset and extending down to Hawk Hill Park, designed to be habitable.

title: Green Hairstreak Corridor - Nature in the City
content: Everyone is welcome to join us in a hands-on experience with this local habitat restoration project. We provide everything you need to learn and enjoy.

title: Green Hairstreak Corridor - Making Nature's City
content: The Green Hairstreak project uses small matrix improvements to connect an existing 2.5 acre patch that has the last local population of a native butterfly.

title: Missed our first two Native Bee Garden Tours? There's still one more ...
